_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channels" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" TEXT NOT NULL, "etag" TEXT NULL, "setag" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channel_snippets" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channel_thumbnails" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), "default_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "medium_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "high_url" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channel_content_details" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), "likes_playlist" TEXT NULL, "upload_playlist" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channel_statistics" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), "view_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "subscriber_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "hidden_subscriber_count" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("hidden_subscriber_count" IN (0, 1)), "video_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channel_statuses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), "privacy_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_linked" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_linked" IN (0, 1)), "long_uploads_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "made_for_kids" INTEGER NULL CHECK ("made_for_kids" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "videos" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" TEXT NOT NULL, "etag" TEXT NULL, "setag" TEXT NULL, "channel_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_snippets" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "published_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "channel_title" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_thumbnails" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "default_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "medium_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "high_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "standard_url" TEXT NULL, "maxres_url" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_content_details" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "duration" TEXT NOT NULL, "dimension" TEXT NOT NULL, "definition" TEXT NOT NULL, "caption" TEXT NOT NULL, "licensed_content" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("licensed_content" IN (0, 1)), "projection" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_statuses" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "upload_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "privacy_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "license" TEXT NOT NULL, "embeddable" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("embeddable" IN (0, 1)), "public_stats_viewable" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("public_stats_viewable" IN (0, 1)), "made_for_kids" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("made_for_kids" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_statistics" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "view_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "like_count" INTEGER NULL, "dislike_count" INTEGER NULL, "favorite_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, "comment_count" INTEGER NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_progress" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "watch_position" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "is_finished" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 CHECK ("is_finished" IN (0, 1)), PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "playlists" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" TEXT NOT NULL, "channel_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), "type" INTEGER NOT NULL, "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL, "etag" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "playlist_snippets" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES playlists (id), "published_at" INTEGER NOT NULL, "title" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "channel_title" TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "playlist_thumbnails" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES playlists (id), "default_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "medium_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "high_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "standard_url" TEXT NULL, "maxres_url" TEXT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "playlist_content_details" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES playlists (id), "item_count" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "playlist_vs_videos" ("playlist_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES playlists (id), "video_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "video_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channel_searches" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "query" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "channel_search_vs_channels" ("search_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES channel_searches (id), "channel_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES channels (id), "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("search_id", "channel_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_searches" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "query" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "video_search_vs_videos" ("search_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES video_searches (id), "video_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("search_id", "video_id"));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collections" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "is_system" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_system" IN (0, 1)), "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series" ("created_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "updated_at" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT (CAST(strftime('%s', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AS INTEGER)), "id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "collection_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES collections (id), "cover_video_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "data_hash" TEXT NULL, "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "series_vs_videos" ("series_id" INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES series (id), "video_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES videos (id), "priority" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("series_id", "video_id"));
CREATE INDEX ChannelsIndexETag ON channels (etag)
CREATE INDEX VideosIndexETag ON videos (etag)
CREATE INDEX PlaylistIndexETag ON playlists (etag)
CREATE INDEX ChannelSearchesIndexQuery ON channel_searches ("query")
CREATE INDEX VideoSearchesIndexQuery ON video_searches ("query")
